# kvindo_gitlab (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "kvindo_gitlab" "example" {
  id = "01abc123def456gh789012345"
}

output "info_fqdn" {
  value = data.kvindo_gitlab.example.status.fqdn
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
